name.description: Short, catchy name of the business

summary.description: Single sentence summary of the business

detailed_pitch.description: Very detailed multi-paragraph pitch for the business idea

competitive_category.description: Short description of the market/category (e.g. 'Shopify bundling app for DTC brands')

competitive_crowdedness.description: Overall crowdedness of the competitive space

known_competitor_patterns.description: Short list of existing solution types or incumbent patterns in this space

differentiation_wedge.description: 2-4 sentences explaining how this business can realistically differentiate and win an initial niche

competition_risk.description: Competition risk level with brief justification

go_no_go_competition.description: Final decision from a competition perspective: proceed as-is or revise the niche
